2026-02-24.content: Translation LLM now supports full [finetuning with LoRA](https://docs.cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/models/translation-supervised-tuning).

summary.title: LLM translation model supports LoRA finetuning
summary.summary: The translation LLM now offers full finetuning capabilities using LoRA. This allows for more efficient and customizable model training. Learn more about implementing supervised tuning with LoRA.
